name: Forgotten Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz.) tomatoes with liquid, diced
1 cup Uncooked small elbow or shell macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker, combine beef, water, tomatoes, bouillon, onion, parsley, salt if desired, thyme, and pepper.
2. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours or until meat is tender.
3. Add zucchini, cabbage, beans, and macaroni; cook on high, covered, for 30-45 minutes more, or until vegetables are tender.
4. Sprinkle individual servings with Parmesan cheese if desired.
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (without added salt and Parmesan cheese) equals 2 vegetable, 1½ starch, 1 meat.
Also, 246 CALORIES, 453mg SODIUM, 33mg CHOLESTEROL, 30gm CARBOHYDRATE, 19gm PROTEIN, 6gm FAT.
